setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Minimal test coverage for existing UnitTest1 class with a placeholder test method
recommendations: Add specific test scenarios and assertions
Consider adding more test methods to improve coverage
keyImprovements: Created test class following naming conventions
fileReports.note: Current test is a placeholder and does not provide meaningful verification

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling and logging
Implement dependency injection for ProducerConfig to improve testability
Add more detailed exception handling in writeMessage method
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as a placeholder Kafka broker. Replace with actual configuration in real-world scenarios.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, disposal, and exception scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more granular exception handling in readMessage()
Add optional CancellationToken support to readMessage()
keyImprovements: Null config and topic name handling
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking Kafka consumer dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, enum values, and edge cases with 100% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for id, productname, and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for quantity constraints
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property meanings
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Verified default and custom object initialization
Tested null and negative value scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests assume no additional validation is currently implemented in the model
